title: HRT discussion documentation
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Lists menstrual-cycle changes, vasomotor, genitourinary, mood, musculoskeletal, and sexual symptoms and their variable severity and duration.

source.title: Menopause: identification and management — Recommendations
source.population: Women, trans men, and non-binary people registered female at birth with menopause-associated symptoms.
source.exclusions: Exact for menopause symptom identification, selected test limitations, shared discussion, and review; international and partial for UAE prescribing and local referral practice.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists menstrual-cycle changes, vasomotor, genitourinary, mood, musculoskeletal, and sexual symptoms and their variable severity and duration.

assessment.text: Defines symptom-and-cycle-based identification in people aged 45 or over and limits laboratory and imaging tests, including FSH in specified contexts.
assessment.rationale: Preserves age, cycle and contraception qualifiers.

source.title: Menopause: identification and management — Recommendations
source.population: Women, trans men, and non-binary people registered female at birth with menopause-associated symptoms.
source.exclusions: Exact for menopause symptom identification, selected test limitations, shared discussion, and review; international and partial for UAE prescribing and local referral practice.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines symptom-and-cycle-based identification in people aged 45 or over and limits laboratory and imaging tests, including FSH in specified contexts.

assessment.text: Requires benefit-risk discussion tailored to age, circumstances, risk factors, preferences, and repeated review when HRT is chosen.

source.title: Menopause: identification and management — Recommendations
source.population: Women, trans men, and non-binary people registered female at birth with menopause-associated symptoms.
source.exclusions: Exact for menopause symptom identification, selected test limitations, shared discussion, and review; international and partial for UAE prescribing and local referral practice.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Requires benefit-risk discussion tailored to age, circumstances, risk factors, preferences, and repeated review when HRT is chosen.

assessment.text: Defines documented review at three months, annually thereafter, or earlier for ineffectiveness, adverse effects, or clinical need.
assessment.rationale: Supports review only after treatment is clinician-selected.
